servinfo.title: Audio System Symptom Diagnosis
servinfo.ptxt: Before performing the following troubleshooting, check if the symptom is not caused by incorrect handling while referring to owner’s manual.
If the cause cannot be identified by the following troubleshooting, replace audio unit with a known-good one. If the symptom is cleared, audio unit is the cause.

ps.ptxt: Faulty audio power supply and ground circuit (including fuse)

action.ptxt: Refer to Audio System Circuit Diagram and Audio System Inspection .
Check radio antenna connectors for connection.
Substitute a known-good radio antenna and recheck reception.
Refer to Radio Antenna Feeder Cable Inspection .

ps.ptxt: Faulty radio antenna power supply circuit

action.ptxt: Refer to Audio System Circuit Diagram and Audio System Inspection .
Refer to Audio System Circuit Diagram and Audio System Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Light mode does not change when lighting switch is turned on

ps.ptxt: Faulty illumination power supply and ground circuit (including fuse)

action.ptxt: Refer to Audio System Circuit Diagram and Audio System Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Audio system is operative, but audio control switch does not control audio system

action.ptxt: Check steering switch connectors for connection.
Refer to Steering Switch (Audio Control Switch and Hands-Free Switch) Inspection (If Equipped) .
Refer to Audio System Circuit Diagram .

condition.ptxt: Impossible to call using hands-free system (if equipped)

action.ptxt: Refer to Audio System Circuit Diagram .
Check Steering switch connectors for connection.
Refer to Steering Switch (Audio Control Switch and Hands-Free Switch) Inspection (If Equipped) .
Refer to Audio System Circuit Diagram .
